merged_events.event_description: The American Embassy at Gaberones (Gaborone) was established upon Botswana's attainment of independence, with Charles H. Pletcher as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

evidence.quote: Diplomatic relations were established on September 30, 1966, when the American Embassy at Gaberones (Gaborone) was established with Charles H. Pletcher as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

matched.notes: Exact match on date (1966-09-30) and status (Embassy). Both refer to the establishment of the American Embassy at Gaborone upon Botswana's independence.
